summary: The diff modifies backend/main.mo and project_state.json. The backend file shows infrastructure for logging (addLogEntry function, LogEntry type, activityLog queue) and helper functions, but the critical tradingLoop() function content is truncated. We cannot fully verify whether all required log entries (price fetch attempt, successful price fetch with value, pre-order placement with side/price, post-order success/failure with order ID/error, and exception catching) were actually added to tradingLoop(). The visible code sets up the logging framework but the actual tradingLoop() implementation is cut off.
